_sample: Hand-built, real-article sample so the Read section is demoable before NEWS_API_KEY exists. scripts/sync-coverage.mjs rebuilds this file from live data once the key is set; keys starting with '_' are ignored by getCoverage(). Snippets are concise neutral descriptions standing in for publisher meta-descriptions.

hr-1-119.title: The 'Big Beautiful Bill' could lead to millions losing health insurance
hr-1-119.snippet: The Congressional Budget Office estimates nearly 11 million more people could be uninsured by 2034 under the package's Medicaid and ACA changes.

hr-1-119.title: Hospitals are making cuts after 'big beautiful bill,' fueling midterm fights
hr-1-119.snippet: Hospitals around the country are trimming services and staff as the law's Medicaid reductions begin to take effect.

hr-1-119.title: What's in the GOP's 'big, beautiful' bill: Sweeping tax cuts, Medicaid reforms
hr-1-119.snippet: A rundown of the package's main provisions, from permanent 2017 tax cuts to new Medicaid work requirements and a higher SALT cap.

hr-1-119.title: Here's the money people in each state could pocket under Trump's 'big beautiful bill' savings
hr-1-119.snippet: A state-by-state look at the take-home savings projected from the law's tax provisions.

hr-1-119.title: Trump hails 'big, beautiful bill' as 'greatest victory yet' as he signs it into law
hr-1-119.snippet: The president signed the reconciliation package at a Fourth of July ceremony, calling it the cornerstone of his second-term agenda.

hr-5582-119.title: Unpacking the price transparency provisions of the Patients Deserve Price Tags Act
hr-5582-119.snippet: A close read of how the bill would codify and expand hospital and insurer price-disclosure rules.

hr-5582-119.title: The 'Patients Deserve Price Tags' Act would empower employers with information. Is that enough?
hr-5582-119.snippet: Analysis of what improved access to claims and contract data would and would not change for employer health plans.

hr-5582-119.title: Senators introduced a(nother) hospital price transparency bill. Here's why
hr-5582-119.snippet: Why lawmakers are revisiting price transparency, and what the bipartisan proposal would change for patients.
